sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1
items.html: It means that one is caused by the other. The outer circle is the reason and the cause of the circle within it, which is caused and extended from the outer one. Thus, “one inside the other” indicates a relation of cause and consequence, or cause and effect between them.
